get.description: Every client with billing profile, autonomy state, contract summary, unbilled exposure and invoice-history count.
Full client detail: parsed contract with clauses, invoice history and unbilled exposure.

patch.description: Flip the per-client auto-send policy. ON lets Robyn send invoices without asking, within contract terms.

post.description: Parse pasted contract text into rate, terms and cited clauses, file it against the client, set the billing profile, and resolve any ATTACH_CONTRACT task.

get.description: The contract on file with its parsed clauses for the clause viewer. Null if none is filed.
The pipeline rail: prospects seen on the calendar but not yet in Xero, with watch state and the agreement-evidence quote once found.

post.description: Loop-2 finish: create the Xero contact, create a real Client, raise ATTACH_CONTRACT and resolve the CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task. Xero failures are non-fatal — the prospect is still promoted locally.
Remove a prospect from the pipeline and resolve its CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task.

get.description: All meetings with state, client, duration, attendees, transcript flag and linked proposal id.
Full meeting with parsed transcript, match proposals, linked proposal and the evidence/decision chain.

post.description: Ingests the calendar (Google read-only if configured, else the seeded .ics fallback), upserts meetings and runs the Loop-1 step on every un-progressed meeting. Updates the CALENDAR connection state.
Fallback ingest path: parse raw .ics text, upsert meetings and run the Loop-1 step.
Saves and parses the transcript, resolves the PROVIDE_TRANSCRIPT task, then runs the Loop-1 continuation (match, price, policy, auto-send or raise REVIEW_INVOICE).
Sets the client, resolves the CONFIRM_CLIENT_MATCH task and re-runs the proposal-building continuation.
post.summary: Confirm the client for a meeting

post.description: Marks the meeting SKIPPED (not billable) and resolves any open transcript/match task.

Reads NEW messages FROM queued/watching potential-client addresses ONLY (IMAP when configured, else the seeded fixture mailbox), classifies each for agreement, and on agreement flips the PotentialClient to AGREEMENT_DETECTED and raises a CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task. Never reads a non-queued sender; never promotes a client (that is ClientsModule).
post.summary: Poll the mailbox for client agreements (check now)

get.description: All proposals with client name, source (meeting/detection), totals, state, policy verdict and Xero link. Filter with ?state=.
Full lines with provenance chips, policy reasons, the source evidence chain (meeting/transcript/detection/contract) and live Xero status.

post.description: Writes an AUTHORISED ACCREC invoice (contact + invoice + decision note + evidence), sets state SENT, resolves the REVIEW_INVOICE task and marks the source meeting SENT. On Xero failure the proposal stays IN_REVIEW and the error is returned in the body (never a 500).
post.summary: Approve and send the proposal to Xero

post.description: Writes a DRAFT (unauthorised) ACCREC invoice to Xero and records its id + deep link, but keeps the proposal IN_REVIEW awaiting approval. On Xero failure the error is returned in the body (never a 500).
post.summary: Create a DRAFT invoice in Xero

post.description: Sets state REJECTED, resolves the REVIEW_INVOICE task and records the reason on the audit trail.

patch.description: Replaces the line set before approval and recomputes line amounts + subtotal, tax and total.

post.description: Runs three idempotent detectors — QUOTE_NOT_INVOICED, RETAINER_STOPPED and EXPENSE_NOT_RECHARGED. Reads Xero when it is live and falls back to local seed data otherwise (evidence.source records which path was used). New detections are deduped by a stable key, so re-running is safe. Returns the created rows plus counts.

get.description: All detections with type, matched client, recoverable value, evidence and state. Filter with ?state= and/or ?type=.

post.description: Builds a single-line InvoiceProposal (provenance LEDGER) from the detection, sets it IN_REVIEW with 20% UK VAT, flips the detection to PROPOSED and raises a REVIEW_INVOICE task. Nothing is written to Xero here — approval lives in ProposalsModule. Idempotent: re-proposing returns the existing proposal.
post.summary: Turn a detection into an invoice proposal

post.description: Sets the detection DISMISSED and records the reason (optional) on the audit trail.

get.summary: List OPEN tasks (the inbox), newest first, each enriched with card context.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by task state. Omit for all states.

get.summary: List all tasks (OPEN and RESOLVED); optional ?state= filter.
OPEN task counts by type, for the inbox badges.

get.description: Three rows — XERO (probed live from Xero health), CALENDAR and EMAIL (read from their ConnectionState rows, DOWN if never run). Read-only: does not trigger any sync/poll job.

post.description: Forces a fresh Xero health check, upserts the XERO ConnectionState row, records an audit event, and returns the refreshed row. The "check now" for Xero. Never throws when Xero is down — returns a DOWN row with the reason.

get.description: Colour-coded events for the calendar view. colorKey is derived from meeting state: billed=teal, proposal=amber, awaiting=amber-outline, unknown=purple, skipped/personal=gray. Optionally window by event start with from/to.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive lower bound (ISO date/datetime) on the event start. Omit for no lower bound.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive upper bound (ISO date/datetime) on the event start. Omit for no upper bound.

get.description: The "£X was walking away" strip: recoverable total plus a per-source breakdown across OPEN detections, IN_REVIEW proposals and unbilled meetings.
The audit trail screen: every state change, Xero write, policy decision and poll, newest first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of audit events to return, newest first.

get.description: Open tasks, total unbilled £ across clients, invoices sent this month, and client count.

info.title: Robyn API
info.description: Robyn turns a freelancer's calendar, contracts and transcripts into invoices in Xero. Every agent behaviour is a state transition that writes to Xero or raises a Task. The LLM parses and proposes at the edges; it never decides and never sends.

tags.name: dashboard
tags.description: Aggregate feeds: calendar view, leak strip, audit

rateUnit.description: Whether the rate is hourly, per-day or a fixed fee.

source.description: CONTRACT (parsed from a signed document) or INFERRED (from history).

provenance.description: Human-readable citation for where these terms came from.

hasContract.description: Whether a parsed contract is on file for this client.

xeroContactId.description: Xero ContactID once created; null until then.

unbilledExposureGbp.description: Sum of DRAFT/IN_REVIEW proposal totals — money not yet invoiced.

invoiceHistoryCount.description: Number of invoices sent for this client.

text.example: The Consultant shall be paid at a rate of GBP 150 per hour.

fileRef.description: Source file reference for the contract.

rawText.description: The raw contract text so the viewer can highlight in place.

scopeSummary.example: Ongoing UX consulting on a time basis.

clauses.description: Every parsed clause, each keeping its citation.

xeroDeepLink.description: Deep-link into the Xero invoice, once written.

autoSent.description: Whether Robyn sent this automatically (autonomy ON).

contract.description: The parsed contract on file, if any.

invoiceHistory.description: Invoices sent for this client, newest first.

enabled.description: When true, Robyn may auto-send invoices for this client within contract terms. Default policy is OFF.

title.description: Human title for the contract (used as the file reference and card heading).

rawText.description: The full contract text. Robyn parses the rate, terms and clauses from this, citing each value back to its clause.
rawText.example: Clause 3.1 The Consultant shall be paid at a rate of GBP 150 per hour. Clause 5 Payment terms are Net 14.

firstSeenMeetingId.description: The meeting this prospect was first seen on.

evidenceQuote.description: Verbatim agreement quote, once an agreement email is detected.

evidenceFrom.description: Sender of the agreement email, if detected.

promotedClientId.description: Set to the new Client id once promoted.

lastPolledAt.description: Last time Robyn polled this prospect's inbox.

clientId.description: The id of the newly created Client.

xeroContactId.description: Xero ContactID if the write succeeded; null if Xero was unavailable.

xeroContactCreated.description: True when a new Xero contact was created (false if reused or Xero down).

xeroError.description: Non-fatal Xero error message when the contact could not be created live. Local promotion still completed.

attachContractTaskId.description: The ATTACH_CONTRACT task raised for the new client.

potentialClient.description: The prospect, now in PROMOTED state.

reason.description: Optional reason recorded on the audit trail for dismissing this prospect.
reason.example: Not a real lead — internal calendar invite.

evidence_quote.description: Verbatim transcript line evidencing the work.

confidence.description: 0..1 confidence — a proposal, never a decision.

auto.description: Whether Robyn may send without asking.

detail.example: The Consultant shall be paid £150 per hour.

autoSent.description: True if Robyn auto-sent it (autonomy ON).

summary.description: Human sentence for the audit trail.

inputs.description: The decision inputs kept so an auditor can reconstruct it.

matchProposals.description: LLM fuzzy match proposals (only when unknown/ambiguous).

processed.description: Meetings the Loop-1 step ran on this run.

xeroError.description: Populated when an attempted Xero write failed (state kept locally).

clientId.description: The Client to bill this meeting to.

reason.description: Why the meeting is not billable.

displayName.description: Display name of the prospective client.

from.description: Sender address the agreement came from.

subject.description: Subject line of the agreeing email.

taskId.description: Id of the CONFIRM_AGREEMENT task raised (absent if one was already open).

mode.description: LIVE = IMAP mailbox, FALLBACK = fixture mailbox, DOWN = IMAP configured but unreachable.

polledCount.description: Number of QUEUED/WATCHING potential clients polled.

messagesRead.description: Number of new messages read from queued senders only.

agreementsDetected.description: Number of potential clients moved to AGREEMENT_DETECTED this poll.

tasksRaised.description: Number of new CONFIRM_AGREEMENT tasks raised this poll.

detected.description: The agreements detected on this poll.

nextPollAt.description: When the next scheduled poll is due (ISO 8601, now + 30m).

source.description: What this proposal was built from

xeroDeepLink.description: Deep link into the Xero UI

excerpt.description: Short raw excerpt for the drill-down

source.description: What this proposal was built from

xeroDeepLink.description: Deep link into the Xero UI

xeroError.description: Last Xero write error, if the write failed
Xero error message when the write failed

reason.example: Client already paid this in cash — do not invoice.
reason.description: Why the proposal was rejected (kept on the audit trail)

summary.description: Human explanation of the leak (from evidence.summary)

source.description: Which data path produced this detection

evidence.description: Flexible per-detector evidence blob (always includes summary + source)

proposalId.description: Proposal built from this detection, if any

source.description: Primary data path used this run

created.description: Number of NEW detections created this run

skipped.description: Candidates skipped because a detection already existed (idempotent)

proposalId.description: The invoice proposal built from this detection

taskId.description: The REVIEW_INVOICE task raised for the human

reason.example: Client was billed for this separately in cash.
reason.description: Why the detection was dismissed (kept on the audit trail)

refId.description: Id of the referenced subject (meeting, proposal, ...)

context.description: Free-form card context (client name, amount, quote, ...). Includes an `action` { method, path } hint when derivable.

resolution.description: Set once resolved by the owning module.

count.description: Number of OPEN tasks of this type.

status.description: LIVE (real credentials working), FALLBACK (running on seed/fixtures), or DOWN (not connected / never run).

label.description: Short label: org name, mailbox address, or calendar id.

detail.description: Human explanation of the current status (e.g. the reason a connection is DOWN).

lastSyncAt.description: ISO timestamp of the last successful sync/probe for this integration.

nextPollAt.description: ISO timestamp of the next scheduled poll (EMAIL cron), if any.

state.description: The meeting state driving the colour.

colorKey.description: Colour token for the calendar view. billed=teal, proposal=amber, awaiting=amber-outline, unknown=purple, skipped/personal=gray.

clientName.description: Matched client name, or null when unmatched/unknown.

proposalId.description: Linked invoice proposal id if one exists for this meeting, else null.

source.description: Human label for this leak source.

gbp.description: Recoverable amount (GBP, 2dp) attributable to this source.

count.description: Number of items contributing to this source.

monthLabel.description: The month this leak strip summarises, e.g. "June 2026".

recoverableGbp.description: Total recoverable amount (GBP, 2dp): OPEN detections + IN_REVIEW proposals + unbilled meetings.

breakdown.description: Per-source breakdown that sums to recoverableGbp.

openTasks.description: Number of OPEN tasks in the inbox.

unbilledGbp.description: Total unbilled exposure across all clients (GBP, 2dp).

invoicesSentThisMonth.description: Invoice proposals sent to Xero so far this calendar month.
